WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L1' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    unguarded variable(s) '#j' in the subformula
      "∀ x #i #j. (A( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
    in the formula
      "∀ x #i #j. (A( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
*/
